Title: Dope Thief
Actors: Brian Tyree Henry, Wagner Moura, Marin Ireland
Plot: Follows long-time friends and delinquents who pose as DEA agents to rob a house in the countryside, but end up unintentionally revealing and unraveling the biggest hidden narcotics corridor on the Eastern seaboard.
Awards: Nominated for 1 Primetime Emmy. 8 nominations total
